title: poa kenteica
intro: Poa kenteica, also known as Kente Grass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of Nepal and parts of the Himalayas. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Poa kenteica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Poa kenteica can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
